value:
Pricing
At Tavily, we offer flexible pricing plans to suit different users, from individual researchers to growing teams and enterprises. Whether you need a free plan to get started or a scalable solution to support your business, we have the right plan for you. Below is an overview of our pricing options.
Free Plan: Researcher
- Price: Free / Month 
- Who is it for? New creators and individuals exploring Tavily. 
- Features: - 1,000 API credits per month 
- No credit card required 
- Email support 
 
Project Plan
- Price: $30 / Month 
- Who is it for? Enthusiasts who require more API usage. 
- Features: - 4,000 API credits per month 
- Adjustable plan with a sliding scale 
- Higher rate limits 
- Email support 
 
Bootstrap Plan
- Price: $100 / Month 
- Who is it for? Small teams that need a scalable search solution. 
- Features: - 15,000 API credits per month 
- Adjustable plan with a sliding scale 
- Higher rate limits 
- Email support 
 
Startup Plan
- Price: $220 / Month 
- Who is it for? Businesses requiring more capacity and scalability. 
- Features: - 38,000 API credits per month 
- Adjustable plan with a sliding scale 
- Higher rate limits 
- Email support 
 
Growth Plan
- Price: $500 / Month 
- Who is it for? Companies scaling up their search capabilities. 
- Features: - 100,000 API credits per month 
- Adjustable plan with a sliding scale 
- Higher rate limits 
- Email support 
 
Pay-As-You-Go Plan
- Price: $0.008 / Credit 
- Who is it for? Users who prefer a flexible, usage-based model. 
- Features: - Pay only for what you use 
- Cancel anytime 
- Email support 
 
Enterprise Plan
- Price: Custom pricing 
- Who is it for? Large organizations with custom needs. 
- Features: - Custom API calls 
- Custom rate limits 
- Enterprise-grade support and SLAs 
- Enterprise-grade security and privacy 
- Custom seats 
 
Which Plan is Right for You?
If you're just getting started, the Researcher (Free) plan is perfect for exploring Tavily’s capabilities. If you require more frequent API usage, the Project, Bootstrap, Startup, or Growth plans offer increasing levels of resources. Businesses and teams needing flexibility may prefer the Pay-As-You-Go model, while enterprises can work with us to build a custom solution that fits their needs.
How to Upgrade or Change Your Plan
You can easily manage your subscription by visiting your Billing page. Adjust your plan at any time based on your usage and needs.
